About the Firm

A Modern Law Firm
Rooted in Trust

Pieters Legal & Consultancy is a modern law firm in Aruba dedicated to providing clear, practical, and reliable legal services. We assist individuals and businesses in contract law, civil law, and advisory services — always with a focus on professionalism, integrity, and personal attention.

With a client-centered approach, we combine deep legal expertise with accessibility and transparency. Whether you need ongoing support, one-time advice, or representation — our goal is to protect your interests and deliver solutions tailored to your needs.

We believe the law should be accessible to everyone, in the language you feel most comfortable with. We proudly serve clients in Dutch, English, Papiamento, and Spanish.

01
Professionalism
Upholding the highest standards in every matter, from first consultation to final resolution.
02
Integrity
Transparent and honest guidance at every stage. You will always know exactly where you stand.
03
Personal Attention
Every client is unique. We listen carefully and tailor our approach to your specific circumstances and goals.

Practice Areas

Legal Services

Contract Law

Drafting, reviewing, and negotiating agreements that safeguard your interests — from commercial contracts to personal arrangements. We ensure every clause works in your favour.

Learn More →
Civil Law

Comprehensive civil litigation and dispute resolution, representing individuals and businesses with clarity, strategy, and determination toward the best possible outcome.

Learn More →
Legal Advisory

Strategic legal counsel for any situation. Whether you need a single consultation or ongoing support, we provide reliable, actionable advice you can build on with confidence.

Learn More →

Our Approach

How We Work

1
Initial Consultation

We take the time to listen and fully understand your situation, goals, and concerns — without legal jargon.

2
Legal Analysis

We carefully assess your case, identify the key legal issues, and map out the options available to you.

3
Tailored Strategy

We develop a clear, practical strategy aligned with your specific needs, timeline, and objectives.

4
Resolution & Support

We guide you through every step to resolution — and remain available for continued support whenever you need us.
